Field.Label: Volume (dB)
Field.Description: Example: -35.0

Field.Label: Step (dB)
Field.Description: Default 1.0 dB.

Field.Label: Step (dB)
Field.Description: Default 1.0 dB.

Action.Name: Z1 Proc Dolby Digital EX Effect
Z1 Proc DTS ES Matrix Effect
Z1 Proc Pro Logic Music Center Width
Z1 Proc Pro Logic Music Dimension
Z1 Proc Pro Logic Music Panorama

Field.Label: Back Surround Trim (dB)
Field.Description: Range: +10.0 to -10.0 in 0.5 dB steps

Field.Label: Center Trim (dB)
Field.Description: Range: +10.0 to -10.0 in 0.5 dB steps (example: +2.0)

Field.Label: Front Trim (dB)
Field.Description: Range: +10.0 to -10.0 in 0.5 dB steps (example: -1.5)

Field.Label: LFE Trim (dB)
Field.Description: Range: +0.0 to -10.0 in 0.5 dB steps

Field.Label: Sub Trim (dB)
Field.Description: Range: +20.0 to -30.0 in 0.5 dB steps

Field.Label: Surround Trim (dB)
Field.Description: Range: +10.0 to -10.0 in 0.5 dB steps

Action.Name: Z1 Trim Step Back Surround Down

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Action.Name: Z1 Trim Step Back Surround Up

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Step Size (dB)
Field.Description: Default 0.5 dB. Must be in 0.5 dB increments.

Field.Label: Volume (dB)
Field.Description: Example: -35.0

Field.Label: Step (dB)
Field.Description: Leave blank for one step (VU/VD). Enter a value (e.g. 2 or 2.5) to change by that amount.

Field.Label: Step (dB)
Field.Description: Leave blank for one step (VU/VD). Enter a value (e.g. 2 or 2.5) to change by that amount.

Field.Label: Volume (dB)
Field.Description: Example: -35.0

Field.Label: Step (dB)
Field.Description: Leave blank for one step (VU/VD). Enter a value (e.g. 2 or 2.5) to change by that amount.

Field.Label: Step (dB)
Field.Description: Leave blank for one step (VU/VD). Enter a value (e.g. 2 or 2.5) to change by that amount.
